2606.31844.title: Bridging Local Observation and Global Simulation in Closed-Loop Traffic Modeling
2606.31844.paper_summary: A local-to-global context mismatch arises when autoregressive traffic simulators trained on ego-centric driving logs are deployed in globally observable closed-loop environments. In such logs, the ego vehicle has rich local observations, while surrounding agents are only partially observed due to perception limits and occlusions. As a result, simulators may learn incomplete context--action mappings that remain hidden in log-based training but emerge during closed-loop rollouts, leading to unrealistic behaviors such as abnormal stops, unsafe interactions, and rule violations. We propose CRAFT, a Contextual pReference Alignment Framework for Traffic Simulation, to mitigate this mismatch via self-supervised failure discovery and preference-guided test-time alignment. CRAFT treats the base simulator as a globally observable sandbox, generating diverse what-if rollouts from logged initial states to expose context-induced failures. These failures are grounded with human-aligned driving priors and converted into preference supervision for training a Contextual Preference Evaluator (CPE). At inference time, CPE acts as a plug-in alignment module that scores candidate actions under complete scene context and reweights autoregressive decoding toward globally coherent behaviors. CRAFT mitigates this local-to-global contextual bias, reducing collisions by 31.2\% and traffic violations by 33.2\% without retraining the base simulator.
2606.31844.paper_summary_zh: 當基於自我中心駕駛日誌訓練的自回歸交通模擬器在全球可觀察的閉環環境中部署時，會出現局部與全局上下文不匹配的情況。在這些日誌中，自我車輛擁有豐富的局部觀察，而周圍的代理則因感知限制和遮擋而僅部分可觀察。因此，模擬器可能學習到不完整的上下文-行動映射，這些映射在基於日誌的訓練中保持隱藏，但在閉環回放中出現，導致不現實的行為，如異常停車、不安全的互動和違規行為。我們提出CRAFT，一種用於交通模擬的上下文偏好對齊框架，以通過自我監督的失敗發現和偏好引導的測試時間對齊來減輕這一不匹配。CRAFT將基礎模擬器視為全球可觀察的沙盒，從日誌的初始狀態生成多樣的假設回放，以暴露由上下文引起的失敗。這些失敗與人類對齊的駕駛先驗相結合，並轉化為偏好監督，用於訓練上下文偏好評估器（CPE）。在推理時，CPE作為一個插件對齊模塊，根據完整的場景上下文對候選行動進行評分，並重新加權自回歸解碼，以朝向全球一致的行為。CRAFT減輕了這種局部與全局的上下文偏見，將碰撞減少了31.2\%，交通違規減少了33.2\%，而無需重新訓練基礎模擬器。
2606.31844.author: Ziyan Wang et.al.
2606.31844.authors: Ziyan Wang, Tan Xiang, Peng Chen, Xintao Yan
